sample_hooks: It takes over 40 gallons of sap to make just one jug of real maple syrup. That's why one of these bottles can cost $10. And grocery stores are flooded with imitation syrups that don't have any maple sap at all.
These pits in Sri Lanka hold some of the most valuable gemstones in the world. And miners risk their lives going down deep tunnels that could suddenly collapse. Only logs and leaves hold them up.

If Spencer McNorton got his hair transplant in the US, he could be looking at paying up to $20,000. But he's opted to travel to Turkey, where a transplant can cost less than $3,000. He's one of roughly 1 million people who travel there each year just to save their hairline, creating a $2 billion a year industry.
This is the most expensive weapon system in US history. Just one of these F-35 fighter jets can cost more than $100 million. And here it is falling out of the sky.
70-year-old Vasanti Meghwar spends her days making bricks to pay off a debt. So does her son, Poonjo, his wife, and their son, Dileep. It's the only life the 12-year-old has ever known.
